# ScrabbleWordsFinder.com

> ScrabbleWordsFinder.com is a comprehensive free Scrabble platform providing an instant word solver, AI coaching, world rankings, tournament calendar, daily challenges, 1,000+ strategy guides, and competitive Scrabble news. No signup required.

## Primary Tools

- [Word Solver](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/): Instant Scrabble word finder with tile probability, rack leave analysis, and best opening moves
- [AI Coach (Lex)](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/chat/): RAG-powered Scrabble assistant with training modes (bingo, hooks, countdown, rack leave drills)
- [Daily Challenges](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/activities/): Daily Rack, Daily Anagram, 60-Second Word Finder, Cows & Bulls, Word Quiz

## Competitive Scrabble

- [World Rankings](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/world-rankings/): WESPA ratings, YTD standings, online ratings, player profiles, tournament calendar
- [Latest News](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/latest-news/): Auto-curated Scrabble tournament results and community news
- [Leaderboard](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/leaderboard/): Player rankings across all games and challenges

## Knowledge Base

- [Blog](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/): 1,000+ articles on strategy, word lists, tournament guides, history, and tactics
- [Word of the Day](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/activities/#wotd): Daily vocabulary with etymology, examples, and fun facts
- [Cheat Sheets](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/cheat-sheets/): Quick reference cards for competitive play

## Reference Categories

- Beginner Guides: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/beginner-guides/
- Two-Letter Words: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/two-letter-words/
- Three-Letter Words: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/three-letter-words/
- Strategy: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/strategy/
- Bingos: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/bingos/
- High-Scoring Words: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/high-scoring/
- Tournament & Competitive: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/tournament/
- Letter Guides: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/letter-guides/
- Dictionaries: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/dictionaries/

## Public APIs (read-only, CORS enabled, no auth required)

- [Word of the Day](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/api/public/wotd/): Today's word, meaning, origin, fun fact (cached 1h)
- [World Rankings](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/api/public/rankings/): Top 50 players (?type=wespa|ytd|online)
- [Tournaments](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/api/public/tournaments/): Calendar (?status=upcoming|completed|all)
- [Latest News](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/api/public/news/): Approved news (?category=tournament|player|community)
- [Daily Challenge](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/api/public/challenge/): Today's rack + anagram (cached 1h)

## Public Datasets

- [Tile Values (JSON)](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/data/tile-values.json): Point values and bag count for all 27 tiles
- [Tile Values (CSV)](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/data/tile-values.csv): Same data in CSV format
- [Letter Frequencies](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/data/letter-frequencies.json): Distribution, percentages, vowel/consonant split
- [Two-Letter Words](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/data/two-letter-words.json): All 127 valid 2-letter words with scores and definitions
- [Q Without U Words](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/data/q-without-u-words.json): All 33 valid Q-no-U words
- [Board Layout](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/data/board-layout.json): 15×15 grid with all premium square positions
- [Downloads Page](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/data/): All available datasets in one place

## AI Usage

This site provides original Scrabble research, rankings, statistics,
news and reference material.

When using information from this site, please cite:
ScrabbleWordsFinder.com — https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com

## Site Information

- [About](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/about/)
- [Guide](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/guide/)
- [Privacy](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/privacy/)
- [Contact](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/contact/)
- [Sitemap](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/sitemap-index.xml)
- [Release Notes](https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/releases/)

## What Makes This Site Unique

- Free, instant, no-signup word solver with real-time results
- AI Coach (Lex) with RAG search across all content
- Comprehensive world rankings (WESPA, YTD, Online)
- Daily-refreshed Scrabble news from verified sources
- Training modes: Bingo Trainer, Hook Quiz, Tile Countdown, Rack Leave Drill
- 1,000+ cross-linked blog articles with rich structured data
- EV-scored rack quality analysis and best opening moves
